specific: Implement JWT-based user authentication with login, logout, and token refresh endpoints
measurable: Auth middleware handles 100% of protected routes, login/logout work end-to-end, token refresh prevents session expiry, all tests pass with >90% coverage
achievable: Using existing Express framework, JWT library already in dependencies, user model exists in src/models/user.ts
relevant: Required for all user-facing features, blocks profile and settings implementation, security foundation for the application
time_bound: Complete within 2 hours, tests must pass before submission

deliverables.name: auth-middleware.ts
deliverables.description: JWT verification middleware for protected routes

deliverables.name: auth-routes.ts
deliverables.description: Login, logout, and token refresh endpoints

acceptance_criteria.criterion: POST /api/auth/login returns JWT token on valid credentials
acceptance_criteria.method: Run integration test with valid user credentials
Verify refresh token is blacklisted after logout
Use valid refresh token to get new access token

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Protected routes return 401 without valid token
acceptance_criteria.method: Request protected endpoint without Authorization header

risks.risk: Token refresh edge cases may need careful handling
risks.mitigation: Review existing token refresh patterns in the codebase

risks.risk: Must coordinate with existing session management
risks.mitigation: Check for existing session handling and integrate properly
